info.title: FIVUCSAS Identity Core API
info.description: Face and Identity Verification Using Cloud-based SaaS - Identity Core API. Multi-tenant biometric authentication platform with OAuth 2.0/OIDC, N-step MFA, WebAuthn/FIDO2, and identity verification pipeline.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Login, register, MFA, 2FA, password reset, email/phone verification

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User CRUD, profile, settings, guest management

tags.name: Enrollment
tags.description: Biometric enrollment management and liveness verification

tags.name: Auth Flows
tags.description: Tenant auth flow configuration (N-step MFA)

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Auth session execution and cross-device session management

tags.name: OAuth 2.0
tags.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow, token exchange, OIDC userinfo

tags.name: OAuth 2.0 Clients
tags.description: OAuth 2.0 client application CRUD

tags.name: OpenID Connect
tags.description: OIDC discovery and JWKS endpoints

tags.name: WebAuthn
tags.description: FIDO2/WebAuthn credential registration and authentication

tags.name: Biometric
tags.description: Face, fingerprint, and voice biometric enrollment and verification

tags.name: Verification
tags.description: Identity verification pipeline (KYC, document scan, liveness)

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: Multi-tenant management

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Role and permission management, user-role assignment

tags.name: Audit
tags.description: Audit log and system statistics

tags.name: OTP
tags.description: Email/SMS OTP and TOTP setup and verification

tags.name: QR Authentication
tags.description: QR code generation and cross-device login sessions

tags.name: NFC
tags.description: NFC card enrollment and verification

tags.name: Devices
tags.description: Device management and step-up authentication

tags.name: Auth Methods
tags.description: Auth method listing and tenant method configuration

tags.name: Admin Overview
tags.description: Cross-tenant admin overview endpoints

tags.name: System
tags.description: Health check and system statistics

post.summary: Register a new user
Login with email and password

200.description: Login successful (may return mfaSessionToken if MFA required)

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token
Logout and revoke refresh token
Request a password reset code via email

200.description: Reset code sent (always returns success to prevent email enumeration)

post.summary: Reset password using the code from email

400.description: Invalid email, code, or password complexity

post.summary: Send email verification code
Verify email address using OTP code
Send phone verification code via SMS
Verify phone number using OTP code
Send 2FA verification code to user's email
Verify 2FA code to complete login
Verify 2FA using any supported auth method
Send 2FA verification code via SMS

get.summary: Check if the current user's tenant requires 2FA

post.summary: Verify an MFA step (public - no JWT required, uses session token)

200.description: MFA step result. Status is STEP_COMPLETED (more steps remain) or AUTHENTICATED (all steps done, JWT issued)

post.summary: Generate QR token during MFA flow (public, uses session token)
Send OTP during MFA flow (public, uses session token)
Create new user
Change user password
Invite a guest user
Accept a guest invitation

get.summary: List guest invitations for current tenant

post.summary: Revoke guest access
Extend guest access duration
Retry a failed enrollment

400.description: Only failed enrollments can be retried

post.summary: Start enrollment for a user

get.summary: Validate enrollment health against actual backing data

post.summary: Submit enrollment with face image and identity information
Request a liveness challenge for enrollment verification
Verify liveness challenge with captured frames

get.summary: List auth flows for a tenant

post.summary: Create a new auth flow
Start a new auth session
Complete an auth session step
Skip an auth session step
Cancel an auth session

get.summary: Get all active sessions for authenticated user

delete.summary: Revoke a specific session (logout that device)
Revoke all other sessions (logout from all other devices)

200.description: Authorization code or auth session info

post.summary: Exchange authorization code for tokens

get.summary: List all OAuth2 clients for the authenticated user's tenant

post.summary: Register a new OAuth2 client (returns client_secret in plaintext once)

get.summary: Get OAuth2 client details (secret is masked)

patch.summary: Toggle active/inactive status of an OAuth2 client

post.summary: Create a new verification session
Submit a verification step result
Review a verification step (admin)

403.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, or TENANT_ADMIN role

post.summary: Complete a verification session
Create a new tenant (root only)
Activate a tenant (root only)
Suspend a tenant (root only)

get.summary: List auth methods configured for a tenant

put.summary: Configure an auth method for a tenant

get.summary: Get available audit log action types
Get current user's own activity logs
Check biometric processor health via proxy

post.summary: Enroll user's face biometric data
Multi-image face enrollment (2-5 images for stronger template)
Verify user's face against enrolled biometric data
Enroll user's fingerprint biometric data
Verify user's fingerprint against enrolled biometric data
Enroll user's voice biometric data
Verify user's voice against enrolled biometric data

delete.summary: Delete user's enrolled face biometric data
Delete user's enrolled fingerprint biometric data
Delete user's enrolled voice biometric data

post.summary: Search for a face in enrolled database (1:N identification)
Search for a speaker in enrolled database (1:N voice identification)
Detect card type from image (Turkish ID, passport, driver's license, etc.)
Register a biometric device for step-up authentication
Request a challenge nonce for biometric verification
Verify a signed biometric challenge
Create new role
Assign permission to role

post.summary: Assign a role to a user

delete.summary: Revoke a role from a user

Verify an email OTP code
Send an OTP code via SMS to the user
Verify an SMS OTP code
Set up TOTP for a user - generates secret and OTP auth URI
Verify TOTP setup by providing an initial code from authenticator app

post.summary: Generate a QR authentication token for the user
Create a new QR login session

get.summary: Get QR login session status (poll endpoint)

Enroll an NFC card for a user
Verify an NFC card - returns user info if enrolled

delete.summary: Remove NFC enrollment for a user

Generate WebAuthn registration options (challenge) for credential creation
Verify WebAuthn registration (attestation) and store credential

Complete WebAuthn registration: validate attestation and store credential
Generate WebAuthn authentication options (challenge) for navigator.credentials.get()

200.description: Authentication options with challenge and allowed credentials

post.summary: Verify WebAuthn authentication assertion from navigator.credentials.get()
Register device public key for step-up auth
Request a challenge nonce for step-up verification
Verify signed challenge for step-up authentication

get.summary: List all auth flows across all tenants (admin)
List all auth sessions across all tenants (admin)

get.description: Returns OIDC provider metadata (issuer, endpoints, supported scopes, claims, PKCE methods). Note: This endpoint is at the server root, not under /api/v1.

get.summary: JSON Web Key Set for token verification metadata
get.description: Returns JWKS metadata. Since this service uses HMAC-SHA512 (symmetric key), the actual secret is never exposed. Note: This endpoint is at the server root, not under /api/v1.
